# PHIL.051 ? Rationalism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western

## Core Principles
Knowledge through reason alone; innate ideas; deductive method; clear and distinct ideas; mathematical model

## Application
Trust reason over senses; deduce from first principles; seek certainty through clear ideas; mathematical reasoning; systematic doubt

## Key Values
- Rational certainty
- Innate knowledge
- Deduction
- Mathematical clarity
